editorState.prompt: Photorealistic 8k resolution editorial photography of a cutting-edge sound system design studio, featuring sleek modern workstations with high-end audio equipment, futuristic speaker prototypes, and holographic sound wave visualizations floating in the air. Cinematic volumetric lighting creates dramatic shadows and highlights across polished surfaces, revealing intricate acoustic engineering details. Clean minimalist architecture with floor-to-ceiling windows, industrial concrete walls, and sophisticated LED accent lighting. Shot with wide-angle lens from elevated perspective, showcasing the innovative workspace with empty negative space on the left side for text overlay.
